Class CareerManager

java.lang.Object
simcli.entities.managers.CareerManager
public class CareerManager extends Object
Manages a Sim's employment state: current job, tier/promotion level, shift tracking, truancy detection, and daily resets.

Extracted from Sim to follow the Single Responsibility Principle — the Sim class delegates all career-related logic to this manager.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CareerManager()
    Constructs a new CareerManager with the Sim starting as Job.UNEMPLOYED at tier 1.
    CareerManager(Job job)
    Constructs a new CareerManager with a pre-assigned career.

    Increments the shifts-worked-today counter by one.

    Promotes the Sim to the next tier in their current career, if they have not yet reached the maximum tier.

  • Constructor Details

    • CareerManager

      public CareerManager()
      Constructs a new CareerManager with the Sim starting as Job.UNEMPLOYED at tier 1.

    • CareerManager

      public CareerManager(Job job)
      Constructs a new CareerManager with a pre-assigned career.
      Parameters:
      job - the starting career.

  • Method Details

    • checkTruancy

      public void checkTruancy(String simName)
      Checks whether the Sim has missed too many consecutive days of work.

      If the counter exceeds 3, the Sim is automatically fired and reverted to Job.UNEMPLOYED. Otherwise a warning is logged.

      Parameters:
      simName - the Sim's display name (used in log messages).

    • promote

      public void promote(String simName)
      Promotes the Sim to the next tier in their current career, if they have not yet reached the maximum tier.
      Parameters:
      simName - the Sim's display name (used in log messages).

    • changeJob

      public void changeJob(Job newJob, String simName)
      Switches the Sim to a new career, resetting tier and attendance counters.
      Parameters:
      newJob - the new career to assign.
      simName - the Sim's display name (used in log messages).

    • resetDaily

      public void resetDaily(boolean zeroShifts)
      Resets daily shift and overwork tracking at the start of a new day.
      Parameters:
      zeroShifts - true to also reset the shifts-worked counter.

    • getCareer

      public Job getCareer()
      Returns the Sim's current career.
      Returns:
      the current Job.

    • setCareer

      public void setCareer(Job career)
      Sets the Sim's career directly. Used for save/load restoration.
      Parameters:
      career - the career to assign.

    • getJobTier

      public int getJobTier()
      Returns the current promotion tier.
      Returns:
      the job tier (1-indexed).

    • setJobTier

      public void setJobTier(int tier)
      Sets the promotion tier directly. Used for save/load restoration.
      Parameters:
      tier - the tier to set.

    • getConsecutiveDaysMissed

      public int getConsecutiveDaysMissed()
      Returns the number of consecutive days of work missed.
      Returns:
      the consecutive-days-missed counter.

    • setConsecutiveDaysMissed

      public void setConsecutiveDaysMissed(int days)
      Sets the consecutive-days-missed counter directly. Used for save/load restoration.
      Parameters:
      days - the number of consecutive days missed.

    • getShiftsWorkedToday

      public int getShiftsWorkedToday()
      Returns the number of shifts worked during the current day.
      Returns:
      shifts worked today.

    • incrementShiftsWorkedToday

      public void incrementShiftsWorkedToday()
      Increments the shifts-worked-today counter by one.

    • hasWarnedAboutOverwork

      public boolean hasWarnedAboutOverwork()
      Returns whether the overwork warning has been displayed this cycle.
      Returns:
      true if the warning was already shown.

    • setWarnedAboutOverwork

      public void setWarnedAboutOverwork(boolean warned)
      Sets the overwork warning flag.
      Parameters:
      warned - true to mark the warning as shown.
